name: Planetel S.p.A.
summary: PLANETEL S.p.A. offers integrated telecommunication services in Italy. The company provides fiber optic network services for businesses, and wholesale and residential customers through a network of 1,400 kms of fiber optic network in 96 Municipalities. It also offers voice, internet, and data services; IP communication services; broadband and ultra-broadband services in various modes, including xDSL, FTTC, FTTH, FTTP, and radio connectivity; virtual bandwidth, managed hosting, managed housing, and colocation services; and telephone systems and virtual switchboard services. In addition, the company provides IT, cloud, and web services. PLANETEL S.p.A. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Treviolo, Italy.
